title: Split Out Node Error with Array Input
symptom: When using the Split Out node with an array input, an error occurs stating 'this.getNodeParameter(…).split is not a function'. This prevents the workflow from executing as expected.
applies_when: Input is an array from an API
not_this_if: Input is a single value or not an array
root_cause: The Split Out node expects a specific format for the input data. If the input is not a string or if the parameter being accessed does not return a string, the split function cannot be executed, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Ensure the input to the Split Out node is a properly formatted array.
Check that the field being referenced is correctly specified without using curly braces.
Test the workflow again after making these adjustments.
agent_instruction: Verify the input format and field reference in the Split Out node settings.
